scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run -w server dev" "npm run -w client dev" --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "blue,green"
scripts.build: npm run -w server build && npm run -w client build
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run -w server start" "npm run -w client start" --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "blue,green"
scripts.start:prod: concurrently "npm run -w server start:prod" "npm run -w client start" --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "blue,green"
scripts.lint: npm run -w client lint && npm run -w server lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm run -w client lint:fix && npm run -w server lint:fix
scripts.test: npm run -w client test && npm run -w server test
scripts.clean: npm run -w client clean && npm run -w server clean
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && rm -rf node_modules client/node_modules server/node_modules
scripts.type-check: npm run -w client type-check && npm run -w server type-check
scripts.format: npm run -w client format && npm run -w server format
scripts.format:check: npm run -w client format:check && npm run -w server format:check
